home.title: Skill Hub
home.subtitle: Discover, Share & Manage Agent Skills
home.description: An open platform for sharing lightweight, portable AI agent skills. Upload your skills, discover community contributions, and extend your agents' capabilities.
home.advantage1Desc: Skills are just folders with a SKILL.md file — easy to create, version, and share across any agent platform.
home.advantage2Desc: Agents load only what they need: metadata at startup, full instructions on activation, resources on demand.
home.advantage3Desc: Browse, star, and download skills created by the community. Share your expertise and help others build better agents.

skill.fileContent: Select a file to view its content
skill.noAuthorSkills: No other skills from this author
skill.loginToStar: Sign in to star this skill
skill.createInPathPrompt: Create in {path}. Please enter a name:
skill.renameConfirm: Are you sure you want to rename {from} to {to}?
skill.deleteFileConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete file {path}?
skill.deleteFolderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete folder {path} and all its contents?
skill.invalidNameInput: Invalid name. Do not use /, \, .. or null characters.
skill.slashNotAllowedInName: Please enter only a name here, not a nested path.
skill.customSummaryPlaceholder: Set a custom summary for skill cards...
skill.customSummaryHint: If left empty, the summary automatically falls back to SKILL.md metadata description.

dashboard.title: My Dashboard
dashboard.noSkills: You haven't uploaded any skills yet
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this skill?
dashboard.uploadDescription: Upload a ZIP file containing your skill directory. Must include a valid SKILL.md file.
dashboard.dragDrop: Drag & drop your ZIP file here, or click to browse
dashboard.createDescription: Start with a template and edit online
